author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Introducing Impact, a Star Atlas Summit

The time is right. We're hosting the first-ever Star Atlas conference at Solana Breakpoint! 

Introducing Impact, a one-day Star Atlas Summit. You can expect:
 Exciting team presentations
 A tournament featuring a new multiplayer map with prizes  
 A chance for attendees to grab a rare ship skin
 Meet Star Atlas guilds and IP projects

Can't attend in person? No worries, we'll stream the entire day!

 Register now: https://lu.ma/3728vl8l?tk=BHV5Al
